name: ClawKit Creative Studio
description: Helps OpenClaw scan full websites and apps, understand product flows, and create launch-ready promotional images, scripts, storyboards, and campaign packs.

defaultAudience.label: Default audience
defaultAudience.help: Optional default audience for launch and promotional assets.

requireApprovalForCapture.label: Require approval before capture
requireApprovalForCapture.help: Recommended before OpenClaw browses private apps, takes screenshots, or records video.
